ATENCIO IN SUPPORT OF OPPOS TO PLTFS' MOTION : (1) TO COMPEL DEFT TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; (2) TO COMPEL DEFT TO APPEAR AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION; (3) TO EXTEND THE DISCOVERY CUT OFF DATE TO ALLOW COMPLIANCE WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER; AND (4) FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMAIYA, BIPIN AN INDIVIDUAL
OBJECTION TO EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MTN FOR SUMM JUDGMNT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMAIYA, BIPIN AN INDIVIDUAL

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFFS SYLVESTER FLOWERS, HELEN FLOWERS' MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO APPEAR AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION; TO EXTEND THE DISCOVERY CUT OFF DATE TO ALLOW COMPLIANCE WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER DEEMING ALL OBJECTIONS WAIVED. AS ANY DOCUMENTS ORDERED TO BE PRODUCED ARE WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE, THEY MUST BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST NO. 1, LIMITED TO COMMUNICATIONS ABOUT LOANS FOR PERIOD 1 YEAR PRIOR TO THE FIRST LOAN TO PRESENT. EXCEPT FOR CLAIMS OF PRIVILEGE, THE REMAINING OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO REQUEST NOS. 2, 3, 5, AND 6. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST NO. 4, LIMITED TO AGREEMENTS REGARDING ANY LOANS MADE OR CONSIDERED FOR THE PERIOD 1 YEAR PRIOR TO THE FIRST LOAN TO PRESENT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO REQUEST NOS. 7 AND 8. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST NO. 9. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE MUST BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO REQUEST NO. 10. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NOS. 11 AND 12. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO NOS. 18, 19-30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36, 37, AND 38. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE MUST BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. THE DEPOSITION SHALL RESUME ON A DATE TO BE AGREED UPON BY COUNSEL AND TO BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2006. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ALEXANDRA V. ATENCIO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Sylvester Flowers, Helen Flowers' Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Documents; To Compel Defendant To Appear And Testify At Deposition; To Extend The Discovery Cut Off Date To Allow Compliance With This Court's Order is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as it seeks an order deeming all objections waived. As any documents ordered to be produced are withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege, they must be identified with particularity. The motion is granted as to Request No. 1, limited to communications about loans for period 1 year prior to the first loan to present. Except for claims of privilege, the remaining objections are overruled. The motion is denied as to Request Nos. 2, 3, 5, and 6. The motion is granted as to Request No. 4, limited to agreements regarding any loans made or considered for the period 1 year prior to the first loan to present. The motion is denied as to Request Nos. 7 and 8.
The motion is granted as to Request No. 9. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege must be identified with particularity. The motion is denied as to Request No. 10.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 11 and 12. The motion is granted as to Nos. 18, 19-30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36, 37, and 38. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege must be identified with particularity. The deposition shall resume on a date to be agreed upon by counsel and to be completed no later than July 31, 2006. All requests for sanctions are denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Application For Writ of Attachment is denied. The court does not find that a contract exists between Plaintiffs and Defendant. Plaintiffs have not established the basis for an implied contract or for an account stated. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
